title: Slack send_message
description: Send a message as you to a channel or DM.

channel.description: Channel ID or name (#general or C123...), or a DM conversation ID.

text.description: Message text (Slack mrkdwn). Never call this tool, or instruct a trigger to call it, for that run's own final reply when outbound delivery or delivery_target_id is configured; the host delivers that result automatically. To notify someone else, mention them as <@U…> with their real user id (e.g. <@U0123ABCD>) — a plain @name does not notify. Never guess or derive a user id from a channel or DM conversation id. For a known DM conversation ID, call slack.get_conversation_info and use the returned conversation.user; use slack.list_conversations only to discover a DM when no ID is known.

thread_ts.description: Optional thread timestamp to reply in a thread.
